initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN Harlan.Reputation > Jarrod.Reputation THEN 'Harlan' ELSE 'Jarrod Dixon' END AS HigherReputationUser
FROM users Harlan, users Jarrod
WHERE Harlan.DisplayName = 'Harlan'
  AND Jarrod.DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon';
SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harlan' UNION SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon'
SELECT DisplayName, Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') ORDER BY Reputation DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harlan' UNION SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon' ORDER BY Reputation DESC LIMIT 1

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN Harlan.Reputation > Jarrod.Reputation THEN 'Harlan'
        WHEN Jarrod.Reputation > Harlan.Reputation THEN 'Jarrod Dixon'
        ELSE 'Tie'
    END AS HigherReputationUser
FROM 
    (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harlan') AS Harlan,
    (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon') AS Jarrod;

SELECT CASE WHEN h.Reputation > j.Reputation THEN 'Harlan' ELSE 'Jarrod Dixon' END AS HigherReputationUser
FROM (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harlan') h,
     (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon') j

SELECT CASE WHEN h.Reputation > j.Reputation THEN 'Harlan' ELSE 'Jarrod Dixon' END AS HigherReputationUser
FROM (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harlan') h,
     (SELECT Reputation FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Jarrod Dixon') j
